question: What two distinct powers do Verdant 'Life-Wands' channel?

answers.original: Verdant Life-Wands channel Growth-Force to accelerate plant development and healing, and harness Vitality-Streams to restore health and energy to living creatures.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' can reveal 'Soul-Echoes' that show the true nature of beings.
The Xylotian Sky-Skiff is primarily made from hardened Aero-Coral for its lightweight frame.

entities.name: Verdant Life-Wands
entities.description: Verdant Life-Wands are tools that can channel Growth-Force to accelerate plant development and healing, and harness Vitality-Streams to restore health and energy to living creatures.

entities.name: Growth-Force
entities.description: Growth-Force is a power that can accelerate plant development and healing, making seeds sprout in seconds.

entities.name: Living Branches
entities.description: Life-Wands are carved from still-living branches.

entities.name: Vitality-Streams
entities.description: Vitality-Streams are glowing green energy that can restore health and energy to living creatures.

relations.description: Verdant Life-Wands harness Vitality-Streams to restore health and energy to living creatures.
